title: Healthcare Quality Associate
description: Stryker is seeking a Healthcare Quality Associate to support quality assurance and regulatory compliance initiatives. You'll audit processes, document findings, and ensure adherence to quality standards. Work remotely for a leading global medical technology company.
responsibilities: Conduct quality audits and inspections of healthcare processes
Document findings and develop corrective action plans
Monitor compliance with quality standards and regulations

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Healthcare Administration, Quality Management, or related field
